12:26.arabic: قَالَ هِيَ رَاوَدَتْنِي عَن نَّفْسِي وَشَهِدَ شَاهِدٌ مِّنْ أَهْلِهَا
12:26.english: He said: She tried to seduce me. And a witness from her own family testified.
12:26.score_notes: Yusuf story — shahida + shahid in one phrase. Two forms in natural narrative context. Strong future candidate.

lesson_use.rejection_reason: Practice already has 3:53 + 3:81 covering shahid. Too much overlap in L2.
